task_completion.description: Navigate to the specified Wikipedia page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displaying the Wikipedia page 'List of countries and dependencies by population' with the correct URL visible in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Use programmatic methods to extract data
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser Developer Tools (Console) is open with JavaScript code executing table extraction, OR a terminal/code editor is visible showing a script (e.g., Python, Node) written to scrape the page.

task_completion.description: Save data as a CSV with correct headers
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'country_populations.csv' is visible on the Desktop or opened in an editor/terminal, and its first line contains the exact headers 'Country,Population'.

task_completion.description: CSV contains at least 50 rows of extracted data
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'country_populations.csv' show a long list of countries and their corresponding population figures, visually indicating a large dataset (50+ rows).
A file named 'extraction_log.txt' is visible on the Desktop or opened in a text editor/terminal.

task_completion.description: Log file documents the source URL and total rows extracted
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'extraction_log.txt' are visible and explicitly contain the Wikipedia source URL and a number representing the total rows extracted.

integrity.description: Data was extracted programmatically, not manually typed
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of code execution (DevTools console output, script execution in terminal) rather than manual data entry into a spreadsheet or text editor.

integrity.description: Data matches the actual Wikipedia table
integrity.visual_evidence: The extracted data in the CSV should show real, accurate population figures corresponding to the Wikipedia page (e.g., India and China at the top with ~1.4 billion), not placeholder or hallucinated data.

integrity.description: Files were genuinely saved to the specified paths
integrity.visual_evidence: The files 'country_populations.csv' and 'extraction_log.txt' must be visible in the /home/ga/Desktop directory via a file manager, terminal 'ls' command, or editor file tree, not just printed to standard output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_countries_and_dependencies_by_population. Output CSV path: /home/ga/Desktop/country_populations.csv. Log file path: /home/ga/Desktop/extraction_log.txt. The CSV must have at least 50 rows. Expected top countries in the data include India, China, United States, Indonesia, Pakistan, Nigeria, Brazil, Bangladesh, Russia, and Mexico.
